name: meta-agent-vscode
description: Run meta-agent tasks from VS Code with streaming output and inline permission prompts.

metaAgent.apiUrl.description: Base URL of the meta-agent API.

metaAgent.token.markdownDescription: Bearer token used for `/v1/*` calls. Set this via VS Code's secret storage in production; storing it in plain settings is for local dev only.

enumDescriptions: Approve once before a git push.
Approve every tool call (granular, noisy on long tasks).
Approve each planning step as a batch (recommended default).
metaAgent.permissionMode.description: Permission mode submitted with new tasks. Existing tasks keep whatever mode they were created with.
